'''Harris Sanseon''' was a reporter for [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]]. Along with [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Masters]] [[Dav-Wes Renno]] and [[Jocasta Nu/Legends|Jocasta Nu]], they made a special feature called "[[Who is Count Dooku?]]."

==Appearances==
*{{HoloNetNewsWeb|54|news/1352_1.html|Dooku Spotted in Gree Enclave}} {{1stm}}
